query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_suggestions (id int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, userId int NOT NULL, suggestionDate date NOT NULL, mealType enum('breakfast','lunch','dinner','snack','supper') NOT NULL, suggestionText text NOT NULL, foodIds json, rationale text, accepted tinyint, createdAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (id))
